---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new Azure service or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Which Azure service?**
e.g. Azure Storage Queues, Azure Redis Cache, etc.

**Describe the feature**
A clear description of what you want.

**Use case**
Why do you need this? What problem does it solve?

**Additional context**
Any other context, links to Azure docs, etc.
